title: Craftville Modpack
description:
🇳🇱 De officiële Craftville modpack gefocust op performance.

🇬🇧 The official Craftville modpack focussed on performance
body:
# 🇬🇧 English
This pack was created for the Craftville server.
It includes performance mods and the Simple Voice Chat mod to enhance gameplay.
Note: This modpack is intended exclusively for a Dutch-speaking audience.

# 🇳🇱 Nederlands
Deze pack is gemaakt voor de Craftville server.
De pack bevat performance mods en de Simple Voice Chat mod om de speelervaring te verbeteren.

![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ce86fbeb88578b1d144ba95dfdc4e60ce263108_0.webp)

## HOW TO INSTALL:
1. Download the Modrinth app
2. Search for Craftville Modpack and click install
3. Run the instance, check your settings / keybinds and have fun!

![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ce86fbeb88578b1d144ba95dfdc4e60ce263108_0.webp)

**Heb je vragen? Stel ze in de [Discord](https://discord.gg/craftville)**
